en: and I need to go over the data on customer purchase patterns.
ko: 고객 구매 패턴에 대한 데이터를 검토해야 해.

en: Let Ben take a look at that, too.
Actually, let Ben take a look at that first. Okay.
ko: 사실, 벤이 먼저 그걸 보게 해줘. 알겠지?

en: Don't worry, Becky, backup's good.
Ping me when Cameron gets in?
Hey. Becky?
I've been here nine months, Ben,
ko: 나는 여기서 아홉 달 있었어, 벤.

en: and she's never asked me to take a look
ko: 그런데 그녀가 나에게 뭘 보라고 한 적이 없어, 절대.

en: at anything for her, ever, okay?
ko: 그녀를 위해서 뭘 보라고 한 적이 없어, 알겠지?

en: I hear you, that's frustrating.
I mean, totally.
I graduated from Penn.
I have a business degree,
but I never seem to do anything right around here,
ko: 하지만 여기서 뭘 제대로 하는 것 같지 않아.

en: and you're like 50 years older than me,
and you're deaf.
I happen to think you do a lot of things right.
ko: 나는 네가 많은 일을 잘한다고 생각해.

en: You do so much.
I know, I know that.
But she doesn't.
I mean, I bust my ass for her.
ko: 나는 그녀를 위해 정말 열심히 일해.
